narrative:
Hambden Twp township has 3,420 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.5 percentage points.
